Figure 2: The overall architecture of the proposed framework. The conditional guidance module estimates both short-term and
long-term motion intentions, which are integrated through a soft-mask fusion layer. In the diffusion module, the noise estimator
Fn works in tandem with the refinement network Fr to iteratively denoise and generate future trajectories.
